mapper.select: select u.id userId, tu.status, u.phone, u.avatar_url url, u.username as username, un.name as university from team t, team_user tu, user u, university un where t.id = tu.team_id and tu.user_id = u.id and u.school_id = un.id and t.id = #{teamId}
SELECT t.id, t.team, u.username AS teacher FROM team t left join user u ON t.teacher_id = u.id WHERE t.id = #{teamId}
select t.id, t.team as teamName from team t left join team_user tu on t.id = tu.team_id where tu.user_id = #{userId} and tu.status = #{captain} order by t.update_time desc
select tu.user_id from team t left join team_user tu on t.id = tu.team_id where t.id = #{teamId}

SELECT t.id, t.team AS teamName, t.create_time, u.username AS teacherName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM team_user tu_sub WHERE tu_sub.team_id = t.id) AS teamNum, ( SELECT u2.username FROM team_user tu_leader JOIN user u2 ON tu_leader.user_id = u2.id WHERE tu_leader.team_id = t.id AND tu_leader.status = 0 LIMIT 1 ) AS leaderName FROM team t LEFT JOIN user u ON t.teacher_id = u.id
t.team LIKE CONCAT('%', #{teamName}, '%')
order by t.create_time desc
select c.id as competitionId, c.competition_name from competition c left join competition_team ct on c.id = ct.competition_id where ct.team_id = #{teamId}
select w.id as workId, w.name, w.picture as workUrl, w.introduction as description from work w where w.team_id = #{teamId} and w.competition_id = #{competitionId}
select score, comment, u.username as judgeName, u.avatar_url as judgeAvatar from score s left join user u on s.judge_id = u.id where s.team_id = #{teamId} and s.competition_id = #{competitionId}
